intent: A user-list dashboard. Shows users in a sortable table (name, email, signup date). Includes a button to export the current view to CSV.
features: user table with name, email, signup date columns
export current view to CSV via a download button
notes: Vanilla HTML + JS. The CSV export is a primary feature, not a nice-to-have. Pattern: build a CSV string from the rendered rows, create a Blob, anchor.download = 'users.csv'.
